mapper.select: SELECT pc.id AS collection_id, pc.user_id, pc.product_id, pc.create_time AS collect_time, p.product_name, p.main_image, p.current_price, p.original_price, p.status, p.stock, p.sales_volume FROM product_collection pc INNER JOIN product p ON pc.product_id = p.id WHERE pc.user_id = #{userId} AND pc.is_deleted = 0 AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY pc.create_time DESC
